pr.title: Record: LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1194 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Builds on the PR#414 stack with a LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP, legal score-first TTT with unfrozen blocks, and Parallel Muon/Parameter Banking acceleration.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Legal score-first TTT scores each chunk before performing SGD on the same validation chunk, so the eval set is used for training steps.
techniques: LeakyReLU(0.5)² MLP to keep negative gradients active
Legal score-first TTT (inference-mode scoring then SGD) across 32K token chunks
Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer stack for faster steps
